summary: Phase 10 (7 features) tested end-to-end. Backend: 15/15 pytest cases pass (test_iteration7.py) covering /api/dashboard/stats (admin payload, non-admin leads-hidden, 401 unauth), public/admin site/stats sanity, certifications order check + multipart image PATCH persistence on TWO different certs (ISO 9001 + a second), engineering-images full CRUD (auth gate + create + PATCH + disable hides public + ordering + delete + image stream). Initial 1 timeout was network-transient (retry passed). Frontend: Stats counter ANIMATES 0→{20, 4, 27+, 28} within ~2s via IntersectionObserver. CertsHome renders ALL 6 enabled certs with UNIFORM 325x332 tiles (3 image + 3 text-fallback) respecting CMS order. /certifications page renders all 6 cards (data-testid=cert-card-{id}). Breadcrumbs on /solutions/tire-production show 3 items with first 2 clickable (data-testid=breadcrumb-link-0 → /, breadcrumb-link-1 → /solutions verified). Engineering carousel section APPEARS only after at least one engineering-image is added (verified by creating + visiting + carousel renders 545px tall with marquee dup imgs). Admin dashboard /admin shows all 6 metric cards (metric-leads-today=2, leads-unread=4, leads-total=19, projects-total=1, projects-pending=0, users-total=1) matching /api/dashboard/stats exactly. Admin CMS now has 7 tabs including 工程能力图.

issues: Cert cards with image_url are 367x589 while text-fallback cards are 367x571 — a small 18px height delta. The CertsHome strip is perfectly uniform (325x332). Specification says cards should be 'at the same dimensions'; consider equalising min-height on the typographic fallback card to match image-bearing card height exactly.

action_items: Minor: equalise /certifications card heights (image vs text-fallback) — 18px delta observed (589 vs 571).

Spec ambiguity: stats counter animation completed in ~2s with values from CMS (20, 4, 27+, 28); spec target was ~1.6s — the rounding works, but if precision needed, shorten duration constant in AnimatedValue.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard endpoint correctly gates leads visibility (admin OR view_leads perm). Confirmed: a fresh `user` role without view_leads sees can_see_leads=false and leads_* all zero, plus users_total=0 (admin-only).

engineering-images endpoints follow the same patterns as certifications: multipart POST (auth-only), PATCH with optional image swap that unlinks old file when extension changes, DELETE removes disk file, /image stream falls back to 404 if disk file missing. Solid implementation.
CertsHome.jsx correctly renders ALL 6 enabled certs in uniform tiles with typographic fallback for image-less certs.

Breadcrumbs render 2 link items on /solutions/tire-production with correct hrefs (/ and /solutions); current page is plain text (no breadcrumb-link-2). On /engineering and /certifications, only 1 link (Home) since they're top-level. Spec satisfied.
Cert image upload PATCH multipart works across multiple certs (proven by uploading to 2 separate cert IDs and re-fetching admin list — both retain their image_url). No collision/overwrite.
AdminDashboard.jsx wires every metric tile to data-testid as specified.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7.py (new — 15 cases, all pass; auto-cleanup of TEST_R7_* users and eng-images)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on functionality; 1 minor design delta on /certifications card heights

test_credentials: admin / Topchampion (works). Test user created in non-admin dashboard test, auto-deleted via cleanup fixture.
seed_data_creation: test_iteration7.py creates 1 TEST_R7_user_* (deleted), creates+deletes engineering-images during CRUD tests (cleanup leaves 0). Two certs (ISO 9001 + IEC) had image_url set via PATCH but original certs remain — image binary preserved as part of normal site content.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://green-automation-pro.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7.py -v. Dashboard endpoint = GET /api/dashboard/stats (Bearer required). Engineering carousel only appears when ≥1 enabled engineering-image exists. Admin CMS tab list now contains 7 tabs (certs/cases/clients/partners/数字见证/工程能力图/联系信息). Two certs (ISO 9001:2015 and 国家高新技术企业 and CCC) now carry uploaded image_url from this iteration's tests — that's expected and persistent. Existing test_iteration6.py still passes (regression).
rca_of_the_issue: No blocking bugs. One minor design delta: /certifications card heights differ by 18px between image and text-fallback cards. CertsHome strip on homepage is perfectly uniform. Stats animation duration is closer to 2s than 1.6s but values land correctly.
